name: m1-ops-foundation
title: brainstorm: M1 运维基础（容器化+可观测+健康探针）
creator: suixingchen
notes: M1 builds on archived M0. Context manifests now load backend specs and archived M0 contracts. Keep Docker/CLI/env port semantics aligned: CLI should default from Settings.server, CLI args override env/YAML, and Docker CMD should not hardcode host/port if env override is an acceptance criterion.
